SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRANT, KELLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOODMAN, ANNETTE *THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AT TRIAL DID NOT ESTABLISH AN AGREEMENT TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR PARTIAL COST OF FENCE.
